## Summary

- Describe the user-facing change.
- Call out any schema, auth, or security impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs, screenshots, or diagrams when behavior changed.
- [ ] I used Conventional Commits for this branch history.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env` files, or generated build output.
